brief.objective: SEO/GEO/AI-optimized local marketing website for the 1st Ave NE location, built via the localevolve-factory engine happy-path (single converting landing page + machine-readable menu/schema).
outOfScope: Online ordering system (link out to existing delivery partners)
brief.dataSourcing: Re-discovered fresh from public web sources this session (Yelp, KHAK article, delivery aggregators). No prior build reused.

overrides.reason:
# Audited override — operator walkthrough

This build was executed as a single-session, end-to-end walkthrough of all 8 factory
phases at the operator's request. The runtime's human gates — **Yahya approval**
(phases 0, 2, 5, 6, 7) — cannot be satisfied by a real human signer in this session.

Each such gate is advanced with this audited override so the walkthrough can proceed
and produce every phase artifact. **Real Yahya approval is still required before launch**
and is tracked in `LAUNCH-BLOCKERS.md`. Independent reviewer verdicts ARE recorded per
phase where required (they do not need Yahya).

Actor: operator-walkthrough · Date: 2026-07-05
